overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk along a sandy beach during golden hour. The camera moves past colorful beach umbrellas, sunbathers on towels, and approaches wooden beach houses built on stilts along the coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with scattered umbrellas and towels

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach parallel to the shoreline, passing colorful beach equipment

entered.detail: red and yellow striped beach umbrella planted in the sand
green beach towel with text laid flat on the sand
pink beach towel with text visible on the sand
wooden beach houses elevated on stilts along the dunes
cluster of palm trees near the beach houses
calm ocean water along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide sandy beach during golden hour. Colorful beach umbrellas and towels are scattered across the sand, with wooden stilt houses lining the right side and the ocean visible to the left. The camera walks steadily forward along the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach area with sunbathers and shade umbrellas

events.description: approaching group of sunbathers lying on towels under umbrellas

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach, passing close to sunbathers relaxing on towels

notable_agents.action: woman sitting up on pink towel, adjusting her position

entered.detail: green and blue gradient beach umbrella providing shade
group of people lying on beach towels sunbathing

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a more populated section of beach where sunbathers relax on towels under colorful umbrellas. The wooden stilt houses draw closer on the right as the camera passes the sunbathers and approaches a surfboard standing in the sand.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy slope leading up to beach houses on stilts

events.description: camera begins ascending the sandy slope toward the elevated beach houses

agents.ego_description: walking up the sloping sand dune toward the beach houses, passing a person with a surfboard

notable_agents.action: man standing next to upright surfboard, looking at phone

entered.detail: surfboard standing upright in the sand
sloped sandy terrain leading up to the beach houses

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a sandy slope toward the beach houses, passing a man standing by his surfboard. The ocean disappears from view as the camera moves inland between the wooden stilt houses, with the terrain becoming more elevated and enclosed by the surrounding structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a wide, sun-drenched beach that gradually shifts into an enclosed residential area of wooden stilt houses. It begins with a steady walk along the shoreline during golden hour, passing scattered colorful umbrellas and towels with the ocean stretching out to the left. As the camera moves through a more populated section of the sand, the wooden houses on the right draw closer and the view narrows toward a surfboard standing in the sand. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a sandy slope, passing a man by his board before the ocean disappears from view. Finally, the perspective moves inland, transitioning from the open coast to an elevated terrain enclosed by the surrounding stilt structures.
